_note: Append-only log of all taxonomy changes made by Agent 10 (Self-Improvement). Each entry records what changed, when, and why. Never delete entries — this is the audit trail.

changelog.summary: Initial taxonomy created with 10 genres, 5 topics each, all layer types.

_schema.version: Semantic version string — bump minor on topic add, major on genre add
_schema.timestamp: ISO 8601 UTC datetime of the change
_schema.agent: Which agent or process made the change (self_improvement / manual_init)
_schema.change_type: One of: initial_taxonomy | add_genre | add_topic | add_layer | deprecate_topic | reweight_topic
_schema.summary: Human-readable description of what changed and why
_schema.affected_nodes: List of genre/topic names touched by this change
_schema.before: Snapshot of the affected taxonomy node(s) before change, or null for additions
_schema.after: Snapshot of the affected taxonomy node(s) after change
_schema.performance_data: Optional: page view stats that triggered this change (from Agent 10 weekly review)
